scripts.setup: uv sync --project backend --link-mode=copy && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,cyan "uv run --project backend uvicorn app.main:app --app-dir backend --reload --port 8000" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.dev:backend: uv run --project backend uvicorn app.main:app --app-dir backend --reload --port 8000
